query:
-- Delete stale combined-name author_profiles (replaced by individual author rows)
DELETE FROM author_profiles
WHERE authorName IN (
  'Aaron Ross and Jason Lemkin',
  'Ashvin Vaidyanathan & Ruben Rabago',
  'Ashvin Vaidyanathan and Ruben Rabago',
  'Ashwin Vaidyanathan and Ruben Rubago',
  'Colin Bryar & Bill Carr',
  'Frances Frei & Anne Morriss',
  'Jack Stack and Bo Burlingham',
  'Kelly Leonard and Tom Yorton'
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute
